steps.title: Name the odd integers
steps.content:
The four consecutive odd integers are:
$$
x,\ x+2,\ x+4,\ x+6
$$
The third is $x+4$ and the fourth is $x+6$.

steps.title: Choose the greatest odd value
steps.content: Solve the inequality: $$ 26x\leq-156 $$ $$ x\leq-6 $$ Since $x$ must be odd, the greatest possible value is $-7$. The answer is -7.
